title: staff — realtime broadcast channels
description: Three broadcast channel families for live UI updates. Tenant-level channel for cross-branch HR dashboards; branch-level channel for the branch-manager's daily roster view; user-level channel for a staff's own updates (probation reminders, compensation-changed nudges). Reverb driver (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport. Compensation events are DELIBERATELY NOT broadcast on any channel — they route through the notifications module's HR channel only.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.staff
channels.description: Tenant-wide staff + coach lifecycle stream. Sink for HR dashboards showing cross-branch activity.
channels.notes: Payload is trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). Compensation changes NEVER broadcast on this channel.

channels.name: branch.{branchId}.staff
channels.description: Branch-scoped staff activity. Powers the branch manager's live roster view.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (permission `staff.viewAny` scoped to branch_id OR branch_manager for this branch OR platform_admin)

channels.name: user.{userId}.staff
channels.description: Per-user staff-lifecycle stream. Powers the my-staff-record live-updates widget in the user dashboard (probation reminder, promotion notice, offboarding scheduled).
channels.notes: CompensationChanged is dispatched through a separate HR-channel mechanism — never on the realtime channel (private-tier).
